COURT FINDS THAT A DETERMINATION OF 6 MONTHS OF SUPPORT FROM 10/92 TO 3/1/93 WITH INTEREST AT 10% IS JUST AND REASONABLE. THE TOTAL AMOUNT DUE WITH INTEREST IS $1890.63. RESP IS REQUIRED TO PAY IN EQUAL INSTALLMENTS OVER 18MONTHS DUE ON 1ST AND 15TH OF EACH MONTH. COURT FINDS THAT RESP HAS ABILITY TO PAY SOME PETNR'S AF AND REQUIRED RESP TO PAY $540 IN FEES.
